description: read-only credential gate: validate NGC / NVIDIA_API_KEY / HF_TOKEN against their services before a deploy so a bad key fails in seconds
rules: read-only: reads env vars and curls; never writes generated.env or any deploy artifact
NGC_CLI_API_KEY and NGC_API_KEY are the same personal NGC key under two names; refuses if both set and differ
probes the registry pull scope (what image pulls use), not the platform scope, to avoid false negatives
an unset key is a skip, not a failure: NGC required for any local NIM, NVIDIA_API_KEY only for remote NIM, HF_TOKEN only for edge with gated Edge 4B
compare each ok/invalid/skip result against the chosen deployment mode before continuing
usage: Set NGC_CLI_API_KEY/NGC_API_KEY, NVIDIA_API_KEY, and/or HF_TOKEN in the environment as needed for the target mode. Output: credentials.json (audit) + credentials.json.log (per-key ok/invalid/skip).
limitation: Validates credential reachability only; does not provision, rotate, or write keys. Network-dependent — offline it reports each reachable-service probe as invalid/degraded. Which keys are actually required is owned by the chosen profile/mode.
